name: Active Directory Password Reset
description: Resets a user's Active Directory password using PowerShell. Verifies the account exists, sets the new password, forces change at next logon, and logs the action.
author: sentinel-desktop

parameters.name: username
parameters.label: Username (sAMAccountName)
parameters.description: The Active Directory username (sAMAccountName) of the account whose password will be reset

parameters.name: new_password
parameters.label: New Password
parameters.description: The temporary password to assign to the user account

parameters.name: domain_controller
parameters.label: Domain Controller
parameters.description: Optional: Target a specific domain controller (FQDN). If blank, uses the nearest DC.

steps.description: Open PowerShell with execution policy bypass for AD cmdlets
steps.name: Open PowerShell with execution policy bypass for A

steps.description: Import the Active Directory PowerShell module
steps.name: Import the Active Directory PowerShell module

steps.description: Look up the AD user account to verify it exists
steps.name: Look up the AD user account to verify it exists

steps.description: Display the found user's distinguished name
steps.name: Display the found user's distinguished name

params.text: Write-Host "[INFO] Account is locked out: $($user.LockedOut) | Password last set: $($user.PasswordLastSet)" -ForegroundColor Yellow

steps.description: Reset the user's password to the new temporary password
steps.name: Reset the user's password to the new temporary pas

steps.description: Force the user to change their password at next logon
steps.name: Force the user to change their password at next lo

steps.description: Execute force password change at logon
steps.name: Execute force password change at logon

params.text: Write-Host "[SUCCESS] Password for '{{username}}' has been reset. User must change password at next logon." -ForegroundColor Green
$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Write-Host "[AUDIT] Password reset performed at $timestamp for user: {{username}}" -ForegroundColor Magenta

steps.description: Log an audit trail entry with timestamp
steps.name: Log an audit trail entry with timestamp
